concept: Give me a game where you control a hivemind of small creatures that can only survive by staying connected to each other. Solve environmental puzzles by forming different configurations—bridges, ladders, wheels, catapults—to overcome obstacles while maintaining vital connections between units. Expand your collective by finding lost members and integrating their unique abilities into your organic network. Discover the artificial origins of your hivemind as an experiment in distributed consciousness that escaped its laboratory confines.
